prompt: Generate a meme picture about crypto price "to the moon", which there are candlesticks from the earth to the moon. For the moon, please use the moon in the image provided.
prompt_refined: Generate a humorous, meme-style visual illustrating the 'crypto to the moon' phenomenon. The full moon from image 1 should be positioned prominently in the upper part of the frame. From the bottom of the image, representing Earth, financial candlesticks must extend vertically upwards, creating a visual path directly towards the moon.
objects: Full moon from image 1, positioned prominently in the upper part of the frame
Representation of Earth at the bottom of the image
